scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use SGLang for high-throughput LLM and VLM serving, OpenAI-compatible APIs, frontend language programs, runtime/server arguments, benchmarking, profiling, model/kernel extension, and SGLang repository development.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `sglang` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: benchmarking profiling, frontend programming, model kernel extension, repo development, and serving runtime.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `sglang` when the request names `sglang`, centers on high-throughput LLM and VLM serving, OpenAI-compatible APIs, frontend language programs, runtime/server arguments, benchmarking, profiling, model/kernel extension, and SGLang repository development, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to benchmarking profiling, frontend programming, model kernel extension, or repo development when those focused workflows match.
